title: Hub Meeting
description: Join the Pittsburgh Hub at 12pm for their Hub Meeting! Information about ongoing projects and the hub agenda to the upcoming Shaper year will be discussed!

title: Shred the Debt Fundraiser with Yinz Run Club
description: We are announcing our Shred the Debt campaign at the next Yinz Run Club group run on the Northside, followed by a pint at Mike’s Beer Bar.  Every dollar helps wipe out medial debt!

title: Shred the Debt Fundraiser at Jeni's in Bakery Square
description: Join the Pittsburgh Hub fundraise against medical debt at Jeni's in Bakery Square from 4-7pm!
